description.value:
[2 actions] Archetype, Auditory, Concentrate, Emotion, Fear, Mental

Requirement: You are in Hybrid Form or Full Wolf Form.

You release a legendary howl that resonates with primal terror. All creatures within 120 feet must attempt a Will save (your class DC). Creatures immune to fear are unaffected.

ResultEffect
Critical SuccessNo effect
SuccessFrightened 1
FailureFrightened 3 and Fleeing for 1 round
Critical FailureFrightened 4 and Fleeing for 1 minute; the creature cannot reduce its Frightened value below 2 until the encounter ends

You can use Howl of Dread once per combat encounter.

Suppressed while Sea-Bound.
description.gm: Howl of Dread requires wolf form. The 'cannot reduce Frightened below 2' on a critical failure is a strong debuff — it synergizes with Pack Tactics and Alpha's Presence. The once-per-encounter limit keeps it from trivializing combat.
